World model: Charcoal at cols 26-29 (rightmost). Green strip follows charcoal at cols 24-25. Charcoal doesn't teleport. Level doesn't complete at any position.
Goal model: Maybe need to click on charcoal at rightmost position, or try clicking on the green gap at this position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
        print(f"Charcoal at: {n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green (N) at: {n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Try clicking on charcoal at current position
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 27}])
print(f"After clicking charcoal: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try clicking on green gap
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 28}])
print(f"After clicking green gap: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try clicking on green strip
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 24}])
print(f"After clicking green strip: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
